intended_use: DM-Density is a software application intended for use with compatible full field digital mammography systems. DM-Density calculates percent breast density defined as the ratio of fibroglandular tissue
intended_use_full: DM-Density is a software application intended for use with compatible full field digital mammography systems. DM-Density calculates percent breast density defined as the ratio of fibroglandular tissue to total breast area estimates. DM-Density provides these numerical values for each breast as well as a density category to aid interpreting physicians in the assessment of breast tissue composition. DM-Density produces adjunctive information. It is not a diagnostic aid.
target_condition: Breast tissue composition assessment; identification of dense breast tissue
ground_truth: Expert radiologist visual assessments of mammography density
other_metrics: Reliability assessed using Pearson's Correlation Coefficient for percent density, dense breast area, and total area measurements; Accuracy validated for percent density and total area measurements; Breast Density Grade accuracy assessed using Kappa statistic; Reproducibility assessed with Pearson Correlation Coefficient across two mammograms within two years; Inverse relationship between breast density and age assessed using Pearson's Correlation Coefficient
